creator: erik@tenku.dk
text:
I see now from the logs that 12.4, 13.1 and 14.0 all use C++14 for compilation. 
All CMake builds even have the same number of build steps - this does not make it less strange…

A major difference between 12.4 and 13.1 vs 14.0 is that the builds of the first two use Clang 13 whereas the the build of the latter uses Clang 14. 
I suspect the reason is hidden here somewhere.
